_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of software development models, methodologies, and practices (Waterfall Model, Spiral, Agile, DevSecOps).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including branching strategies, merge and rebase operations, conflict resolution, pull request processes, and collaborative development practices.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.558), LS-K-005 (LS, cosine: 0.533).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.579). Shared vocabulary: [development, knowledge, practices, software]. DCWF-only terms [agile, devsecops, methodologies, model, models, spiral] vs WIDAI-only terms [branching, collaborative, concepts, conflict, control, git] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.875, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.2%). "Knowledge of software development models, methodologies, and practices (Waterfal" and "Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including bran" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.625 ≈ STS 0.579 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [development, knowledge, practices, software] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [development, knowledge, practices, software]. DCWF-only: [agile, devsecops, methodologies, model, models, spiral]. WIDAI-only: [branching, collaborative, concepts, conflict, control, git].
